problem id: bdd63604
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) AND NOT SHL(5)

examples:
  10100110 -> 00101010
  01001001 -> 10010100
  00110010 -> 00100011
  11001100 -> 01001100
  00001000 -> 10000000
  01111110 -> 00100111
  10011000 -> 10001001
  00010111 -> 00010001

query: 01010101
predicted answer: 01010101
